user_prompt: The cover letter you drafted is too generic. Add a sentence about their open-source contributions.
actual_output:
Understood. To make the cover letter more targeted and compelling, I will weave in a specific reference to their open-source work. 

Please provide the name of the company, or if you already have a specific open-source project of theirs in mind, let me know. 

Here is an example of how I will integrate it to ensure it feels authentic rather than generic:

> "Beyond my alignment with the role's technical requirements, I have closely followed [Company Name]'s commitment to the developer community—specifically your ongoing contributions to [Open Source Project]. I am eager to bring my experience in [Relevant Skill] to a team that actively builds and supports the open-source ecosystem."

Send me the company name or the specific project, and I will update the draft immediately.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly addressed the user's request to improve the cover letter by providing a template and asking for the necessary details to complete the task.
